title: nie-hlns W3: Stress test + full workspace CI
description:
## What
Rewrite relay/tests/stress.rs to match on JsonRpcNotification (instead of RelayMessage), verify both barriers still work correctly, and confirm the full workspace test suite passes.

## Algorithm
1. In relay/tests/stress.rs:
   a. Replace imports of RelayMessage with JsonRpcNotification, rpc_methods constants
   b. Change DirectoryList barrier: match on JsonRpcNotification where method == DIRECTORY_LIST
   c. Change Deliver count: match on JsonRpcNotification where method == DELIVER
   d. Change Broadcast send: create JsonRpcRequest { method: BROADCAST, params: BroadcastParams { payload } }
   e. Verify DRAIN_SECS is still sufficient (JSON-RPC adds no significant latency)
2. Run cargo test --workspace and fix any remaining compilation errors from W0-W2
3. Verify the two-barrier design still holds:
   - start_barrier: all N clients wait until they have received DIRECTORY_LIST notification
   - done_barrier: all N clients wait until all have finished sending
   - received count == sent * (N-1) assertion must pass

## Defensive programming rules
- Do not change DRAIN_SECS, N_CLIENTS, or message counts without documenting why
- The two-barrier invariant is load-bearing per CLAUDE.md — do not collapse to one barrier
- If the count assertion is off by more than 0, that is a bug in the relay, not the test

## Agent team: Standard (R + I + T)
- R: Read relay/tests/stress.rs in full; confirm exact lines that reference RelayMessage
- I: Apply the mechanical updates; run cargo test --workspace; report results
- T: Read the original test's comment explaining the two-barrier design; verify the new code preserves both barriers

## Tests
- Stress test itself is the test: N=4 clients, each sends 100 messages, both barriers hold, count == sent*(N-1)
- cargo test --workspace (full workspace) must pass clean
acceptance_criteria: cargo test --workspace passes with no failures; stress test passes; clippy --workspace passes; no RelayMessage references anywhere in codebase
close_reason: W1A already rewrote and validated stress test; zero RelayMessage refs; 308 tests pass
